title: Zillow Q1 2026: Listing Transparency and App Traffic Growth
text: Zillow Listing Transparency and Q1 2026 Earnings Highlights. Q1 2026 Earnings Highlights: Zillow reported strong Q1 2026 results with 18% revenue growth to $708 million. The platform averaged 227 million monthly unique users, with 80% of traffic arriving directly or organically. App Traffic Performance: The Zillow mobile app continues to dominate the real estate app market, with 65% of real estate mobile application traffic. App engagement metrics: 157 homes viewed per second on mobile apps. 50+ million downloads on GooglePlay. 4.7 stars rating with 1.22 million GooglePlay reviews. Listing Transparency Initiative: Zillow launched new initiatives to improve listing transparency and reduce information asymmetries in the housing market. These features include enhanced data accuracy and buyer-friendly information displays. User Engagement: Strong organic and direct traffic (80% combined) indicates brand strength and user preference for Zillow platform. The company's AI mode feature, now live in 5% of markets, contributed to enhanced user engagement. Profitability Achievements: Q1 2026 marked first quarterly GAAP profit on a trailing-twelve-month basis. Net income of $21 million in the quarter reflects operational improvements and cost efficiency gains.
